steps.title: Identify the advantage
steps.content: The notes say Spruce Tree House was built under a rock overhang. They also say the overhanging ledges protected the site from heavy rain and snow.

steps.title: Tie feature to benefit
steps.content: Choice B says there was an advantage but does not explain it. Choice C gives location and dates only. Choice D uses the flat-terrain detail from Ansel Hall, not Spruce Tree House. The option that links the rock overhang to weather protection meets the goal. The answer is A.
